# BastionTech (llms.txt)
Last-Updated: 2025-10-15
Canonical-Domain: https://bastiontech.org
Preferred-Name: BastionTech
Geography: Oviedo, Winter Springs, Central Florida (USA)
Sitemap: https://bastiontech.org/sitemap.xml
Crawl: allow / ; disallow /admin /dashboard /api
Cite-As: "BastionTech (Oviedo, FL) - Web Design & Local SEO"
Content-License: Brief quotations permitted with attribution; no bulk replication.

> BastionTech is a Christian web design and local SEO studio based in Oviedo, FL. We specialize in fast, conversion-focused websites and ethical, measurable local SEO for family-owned service brands and ministries across Central Florida.

Important notes:
- We primarily serve Christian and family-owned small businesses in Oviedo, Winter Springs, and Central Florida, but are open to ethical businesses elsewhere.
- Services: web design, local SEO, hosting & maintenance, custom development (e-commerce, portals, admin tools).
- All websites are responsive, optimized for speed/Core Web Vitals, and include basic on-page SEO.
- Local SEO focuses on Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, and content.
- 2x ROI guarantee (Advanced SEO): if verified SEO revenue is less than 2x the fee over any rolling 90-day period, our fee is reduced until the threshold is met.
- Site Care is $50/mo: managed hosting, SSL, updates, backups, security, and performance tuning.

## Service Details
- Website builds: Essential ($300, up to 5 pages), Professional ($450, up to 12 pages), Custom ($600+, scope-based).
- SEO: Basic ($1500/mo: audit, on-page, 1 content/mo); Advanced ($3,000/mo: GBP, citations, reviews, 2 content/mo).
- Site Care: $50/mo (hosting, SSL, updates, backups, security, performance).
- Custom dev: e-commerce, portals, admin dashboards, integrations.

## Attribution & Tracking
- SEO ROI via call tracking, UTM/source on forms, booking tags, and verified first transactions from Organic Search & GBP.
- Paid ads, referrals, and other non-SEO channels excluded.
